title: [Calyx] Control program should start with control operator
body:
The Calyx native parser doesn't accept programs like this:
```
control { Group1; Group2; }
```
And instead requires:
```
control { seq { Group1; Group2 } }
```

This is similar to the problem discovered in #1662 where `while` and `if` cannot have sequences of groups, instead requiring `seq`. I'm starting to think that this requirement is getting onerous so we'll try to remove it on the native compiler end. In the meantime, we should update the emitter to generate `seq { }` around the control program. The `emit.mlir` test for the Calyx dialect is currently not accepted by the native compiler because of this.
